statement: In every magma, Equation 3170 (`x = (((y * y) * z) * z) * w`) implies Equation 1459 (`x = (x * y) * (y * (z * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0224
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y y) z) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x y) (op y (op z z)))
